public_visibility_note: Candidate records are not loaded by the public homepage until required active fields, geometry, deduplication, and source checks are complete.

records.name: 機場捷運延伸中壢火車站計畫
records.name_en: Airport MRT Extension to Zhongli Railway Station
records.address: 桃園市中壢區，A21環北站至A23中壢站
records.source_name: 交通部鐵道局｜機場捷運延伸中壢火車站計畫
records.dedupe_key: 交通部鐵道局|機場捷運延伸中壢火車站計畫|A21-A23|桃園市中壢區
records.verification_note: Official page says progress was 87.69% as of 115/05/31 and the route runs about 2.06 km from A21 Huanbei to A23 Zhongli. Keep as candidate until contract-level contractor fields and geometry are reviewed.
